name: Chocolaty Double Crunchers - Part 2
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by TASTE OF HOME, OCT/NOV 95
In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugars. Add egg and vanilla; mix well. Combine flour, baking soda and salt; add to creamed mixture and mix well. Add oats, cornflakes and coconut. Shape into 1-inch balls and place 2 inches apart on greased baking sheets. Flatten with a glass dipped lightly in flour. Bake at 350 degrees for 8-10 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove to wire racks to cool. For filling, beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Add the chocolate; mix well. Spread about 1 tablespoon on half of the cookies and top each with another cookie. Store in refrigerator.
